rusty_sword.name: Rusty Sword
rusty_sword.description: An old, rusty sword. Not very effective, but it has sentimental value.

tattered_cloak.name: Tattered Cloak
tattered_cloak.description: A worn-out cloak that offers minimal protection. It smells like it hasn't been washed in years.

broken_shield.name: Broken Shield
broken_shield.description: A shield that's seen better days. It has a large crack and won't block much damage.

dented_helmet.name: Dented Helmet
dented_helmet.description: A helmet with several dents. It might still offer some protection, but it's not reliable.

cracked_potion_bottle.name: Cracked Potion Bottle
cracked_potion_bottle.description: A potion bottle that's cracked and leaking. The contents are likely useless, but it could be worth something to a collector.

loincloth.name: Loincloth
loincloth.description: A simple loincloth. Not very comfortable, but better than nothing.

bone.name: Bone
bone.description: A dry, brittle bone. It might have belonged to someone once.

tattered_robes.name: Tattered Robes
tattered_robes.description: Worn-out robes from a sorcerer. They smell of ozone and old parchment.

tattered_robe.name: Tattered Robe
tattered_robe.description: A worn-out robe that offers minimal protection.

robes.name: Robes
robes.description: Simple cultist robes. Dark and mysterious.

harpy_feather.name: Harpy Feather
harpy_feather.description: A vibrant feather from a harpy. It shimmer with an oily sheen.

shiny_trinket.name: Shiny Trinket
shiny_trinket.description: A shiny trinket dropped by a harpy. It's mostly just glass, but it's pretty.

snake_scale.name: Snake Scale
snake_scale.description: A shimmering scale from one of Medusa's snakes.

lion_pelt.name: Lion Pelt
lion_pelt.description: The pelt of a Chimera's lion head. It's thick and warm.

dragon_scale.name: Dragon Scale
dragon_scale.description: A hard, glowing scale from an ancient dragon. It's incredibly tough.

legendary_hoard.name: Legendary Hoard
legendary_hoard.description: A small part of a dragon's legendary treasure. It's worth a fortune!

bear_pelt.name: Bear Pelt
bear_pelt.description: A thick, coarse pelt from a brown bear.

blink_fur.name: Blink Fur
blink_fur.description: Soft fur that seems to shimmer and shift in and out of focus.

bloody_cap.name: Bloody Cap
bloody_cap.description: A small, red cap that smells strongly of iron.

chainmail_scrap.name: Chainmail Scrap
chainmail_scrap.description: A few links of broken chainmail.

cockatrice_feather.name: Cockatrice Feather
cockatrice_feather.description: A sickly green feather that feels oddly stiff.

dark_cloth.name: Dark Cloth
dark_cloth.description: Fabric that seems to absorb light around it.

dragon_scale_fragment.name: Dragon Scale Fragment
dragon_scale_fragment.description: A broken piece of a dragon's scale.

dragon_tooth.name: Dragon Tooth
dragon_tooth.description: A large, sharp tooth from a dragon.

eldritch_essence.name: Eldritch Essence
eldritch_essence.description: A swirling mist contained in a vial, pulsating with dark energy.

fetid_gland.name: Fetid Gland
fetid_gland.description: A disgusting organ that emits an unbearable stench.

ghost_essence.name: Ghost Essence
ghost_essence.description: Ethereal remains of a powerful spirit.

ghoul_claw.name: Ghoul Claw
ghoul_claw.description: A sharp, filthy claw from a ghoul.

giant_club.name: Giant Club
giant_club.description: A massive piece of wood used as a weapon by an ogre.

griffon_claw.name: Griffon Claw
griffon_claw.description: A hooked claw from a griffon.

hounds_tooth.name: Hounds Tooth
hounds_tooth.description: A tooth from a spectral yeth hound.

kraken_ink.name: Kraken Ink
kraken_ink.description: Deep black ink with magical properties.

owlbear_beak.name: Owlbear Beak
owlbear_beak.description: The sharp, hooked beak of an owlbear.

poison_needle.name: Poison Needle
poison_needle.description: A sharp needle harvested from a blight.

rotting_flesh.name: Rotting Flesh
rotting_flesh.description: Decaying remains of a zombie. Smells awful.

rusty_gears.name: Rusty Gears
rusty_gears.description: Gears from a failed kobold invention.

silver_comb.name: Silver Comb
silver_comb.description: A beautiful, albeit tarnished, silver comb.

smoke_bomb.name: Smoke Bomb
smoke_bomb.description: A crude device that creates a cloud of smoke when broken.

spell_scroll.name: Spell Scroll
spell_scroll.description: A scroll containing arcane symbols. Too damaged to use, but valuable to mages.

stolen_coin_purse.name: Stolen Coin Purse
stolen_coin_purse.description: A purse stolen from some unfortunate traveler.

sturdy_vine.name: Sturdy Vine
sturdy_vine.description: A tough, flexible vine from a plant creature.

thieves_tools.name: Thieves Tools
thieves_tools.description: A set of lockpicks and other tools used for burglary.

troll_fat.name: Troll Fat
troll_fat.description: Thick, oily fat that seems to pulse with life.

vampire_fang.name: Vampire Fang
vampire_fang.description: A long, sharp fang from a vampire spawn.

venom_sac.name: Venom Sac
venom_sac.description: A sac filled with potent wyvern venom.

worg_fur.name: Worg Fur
worg_fur.description: Coarse, grey fur from a worg.
